name: python3-asn1tools
title: python3-asn1tools
description:
ASN.1 parsing, encoding and decoding (Python 3)
This package contains a Python package for ASN.1 parsing, encoding and
decoding. Supported codecs:
* Basic Encoding Rules (BER)
* Distinguished Encoding Rules (DER)
* Generic String Encoding Rules (GSER)
* JSON Encoding Rules (JER)
* Basic Octet Encoding Rules (OER)
* Aligned Packed Encoding Rules (PER)
* Unaligned Packed Encoding Rules (UPER)
* XML Encoding Rules (XER)
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use asn1tools because ASN.1 parsing, encoding and decoding (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use asn1tools as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `asn1tools [options] [args]` as documented upstream for asn1tools.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair asn1tools with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `asn1tools --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
